scripts.dev:contentstack-demo: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch contentstack --ext js,jsx --exec "node --import tsx contentstack/server/index.js"
scripts.dev:commercetools-demo: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch commercetools --ext js,jsx --exec "node --import tsx commercetools/server/index.js"
scripts.dev:agility-demo: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch agility-demo --ext js,jsx --exec "node --import tsx agility-demo/server/index.js"
scripts.dev:test-data-demo: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch test-data --ext js,jsx --exec "node --import tsx test-data/server/index.js"
scripts.dev:contentstack-commercetools-demo: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch contentstack-commercetools --ext js,jsx --exec "node --import tsx contentstack-commercetools/server/index.js"
